steps.title: Identify the core requirement
steps.content: The student's goal is stated directly—identify the title of Singer's first published short story. The notes provide this information: the title is “Gimpel the Fool.” To accomplish the goal, the answer must include the title itself.

steps.title: Find the choice that provides the title
steps.content:
Choice B states the title “Gimpel the Fool” and connects it to Singer's first published short story, directly accomplishing the goal.

The other three choices reference supporting details like publication year, acclaim, or venue, but all omit the title, failing to address the core objective.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
